title: Test Strategy, Contracts, Properties, and Mutation · Mastery Check
summary: Design a layered test suite around risks rather than file counts. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a risk-to-test coverage matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.
Test public behavior, invariants, boundaries, and failure recovery.
Use generated cases for algebraic properties, parser boundaries, and state invariants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: gates tests. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: gates tests. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.

content.text: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Compare plausible approaches against the decision, constraints, evidence quality, and cost of being wrong.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: gates tests. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Flaky Tests, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a risk-to-test coverage matrix.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Retrying a flaky test converts it into a reliable gate. This fails the Flaky Tests contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: GitHub Actions and Status Checks Documentation (Current 2026-07-13) — Controls workflow events, jobs, matrices, artifacts, security, and required check integration.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.

stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Flaky Tests applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.
